name: Danish Pea Soup with Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Yellow Split Peas, washed and drained
2 lb Lean Bacon or smoked pork, cut into one piece
4 Med Leeks, white parts only, cleaned and washed
1 lb Pork Sausage links, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, bring 6 cups water to a boil. Add peas and simmer until tender, about 1 ½ hours.
2. Remove peas and add bacon, carrots, celery root, leeks, onions, thyme, salt, and pepper. Cook slowly until vegetables are tender, about 40 minutes.
3. Remove bacon with a slotted spoon; slice. Keep warm.
4. Add cooked vegetables to the peas and enough broth from cooking the vegetables to thin the soup if desired. Reheat if necessary.
5. Serve soup in wide bowls, ladling it over dark bread, mustard, and beer. Slice bacon and place on a platter separate from the soup.
Serves 6 to 8.
